caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with the text "BOSS TALK 101" in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a recurring logo with five stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE" stacked vertically. To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk in front of him is a black mug with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK 101". As the scene progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expressions and slightly adjusting his head position while maintaining his focus toward someone off-camera. A small logo with the text "BOSS TALK 101" is also visible in the bottom-left corner of the view.
